summary: An AI-powered application named 'Flower' that automates all human activities following given instructions, operating faster than human speed
architectural_notes: Core AI engine required to process and execute diverse human activities
Instruction parser needed to interpret user commands and convert to executable actions
Performance optimization layer for speed enhancement beyond human capabilities
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Organic flower logo with flowing petals in botanical green and purple gradient (flower-logo.dim_256x256.png)
- Abstract background with subtle botanical patterns and soft flowing lines (hero-background.dim_1920x1080.png)

existing_features.title: Create a task submission interface where users can input instructions for AI to execute human activities
Build task dashboard displaying submitted tasks, their status, and execution results in real-time

Design a cohesive visual theme with vibrant botanical colors (greens, purples, warm earth tones) and organic flowing layouts that reflect growth and natural intelligence, applying this aesthetic consistently across all UI components

new_feature_requests.summary: AI-powered task automation system that executes human activities based on instructions
Instruction processing system for AI to understand and follow commands
Performance optimization to execute tasks faster than human speed
Implement backend task processing system that parses and categorizes user instructions into executable task types
Create task execution engine that processes categorized tasks and generates results
Implement performance optimization system that prioritizes and executes tasks efficiently
